item.title: Random Stolen Meme Dump Sunday, December 29
item.description: Kafka tax
item.dc:creator: DrWalters

item.title: But eggs will be cheaper.
item.description: Good lord people in my country are stupid. They think a Billionaire is gonna give them anything? Lol, it’s like they didn’t even watch Scrooge Mcduck growing up. Let me break this down for you. Trump is there to distract; that’s it. He’s a puppet and while we’re all freaking out about the stupid shit he says…we get screwed by laws that affect us that we don’t even realize. There are probably hundreds of examples of this…please share below. I’ll kick things off and share a video about how we’ve pretty much lost any power to fight corporations in court. Let’s learn about arbitration and how you’ve given away your ability to sue a company even though they’ve obviously stepped over a line or should be held responsible for something. Buckle up buttercup. https://youtu.be/sVe_60Pe3yM?si=3exVrD302Qh8pfEF
item.dc:creator: pixelpatron

item.description: And it is just getting started...
item.dc:creator: WolvesAreTheBestPeople

item.title: Insurance companies hate this one simple trick
item.description: I do not condone violence. However, I do agree with the implementation of violence when it is appropriate. It was very appropriate in this instance. FP Edit: Thanks for the conversation spurred by this! Want to help a disabled veteran? https://www.gofundme.com/f/Help-crush-ptsd https://linktr.ee/GridSquares Thanks for any considerations
item.dc:creator: VeteranGridSquares

item.title: It's the 29th ...... what time does the snowball fight end?
item.description: Sleep in late team acorn, then go out and enjoy the day! Team pinecone will take care of all the posting today ...... ;) Go team pinecone!

item.title: Results May Vary. Survivors Encouraged to Scream About Christ During Yuletide
item.dc:creator: HishuiTheSnake

item.title: The power of animals! It looks like they did wonders for this person's mum!
item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.title: A wholesome Sunday dump with cute animals and appreciation for my fav posters on here <3
item.description:
I hope this post can be a little oasis between all the craziness :)
Just wanna mention my fav posters
Im not posting a lot of memes, but Im trying!
Love the THT community <3
My poor heart
This man knows!
Never fails to make me laugh <3
He looks like he will break your heart, but it will be worth it, damnit!
Let it all out little one <3
I blame all of you for the countless hours going down the drain :'D
Cat tax <3 Thank you for all the laughs (and sometimes wholesome cries) in 2024. I hope Imgur wont forget that its you, us, who make this site a good place to hang out. See you next year :)
item.dc:creator: walpurrga

item.title: This whole thing is insane
item.description: Apparently the winning team from last year chose to eat this one. I'm not sure but I keep finding more and more ridiculous clips from this game.

item.title: My favourite comics of 2024
item.description:
https://loadingartist.com/comic/rose-to-the-occasion/
https://loadingartist.com/comic/endgame/
https://loadingartist.com/comic/moved/ I've made merch of this lil guy (store's on sale til the end of the year!) https://shop.loadingartist.com/collections/ghost-box
https://loadingartist.com/comic/candy-man/ 2024’s almost over, so I thought I’d highlight four of my favourite comics from this year! Did any of these make your list too? Thank you for reading, imgur!
item.dc:creator: loadingartist

item.title: Feeding the boys prawns. Percy still can't cat...
item.description: Pierrot continues to amaze me. He could have just taken the prawns, but he showed me he wanted another piece by focussing on the bowl instead. Percy is well... Percy. Chopsticks were used to keep my hands clean while I ate my own dinner with separate cutlery ?
item.dc:creator: xSchnapsx

item.title: Foster kitten deserves all the pets!!

item.title: We've lost a great one
item.description: A peaceful rest to an inspiration
item.dc:creator: mustbethedragon

item.title: It is what it is.
item.description: Maybe Confession Octopus would have been a better meme, but meh. It's just kind of weird yet nice to feel the heart go pitter patter when they post something or comment. Then again, maybe it's just gas. Or an impending cardiac event. Eh. It's still fun. Whee! Anyway, taking the tiniers to rockafeller tomorrow for ice skating. Good night Imgur.
item.dc:creator: TinyOctopus

item.description: Oh yeah, I meant to google that

item.title: Pinecone adorned samurai helmet.
item.description: Hoshi Kabuto-type helmet inscribed by Saotome Ienari, Edo period, 18th century.
item.dc:creator: PigsWeGetWhatPigsDeserve

item.title: Saw this and it cracked me up. Brings back happy memories.
item.description: Merry Christmas, everyone. I need to ask for your help. I hate doing this, but I'm desperate. I'm homeless and have been for a few weeks. I apply to every single job i can find, I do make use of charitable foundations which offer the occasional meal & shelter, but I'm not the only one, and sometimes we get turned away. It happens. I get that times are hard for many people, and I wouldn't ask for help if I didn't really need it. I'm really struggling, and honestly, every bit helps. If you can help, it'd mean the world to me: https://ko-fi.com/chakos888 If not, I understand and wish you the best of days x
item.dc:creator: Skeebeedeebop

item.title: Day 114 of my journey for a wheelchair
item.description: 16050/36500 https://gofund.me/8b5802c4
item.dc:creator: Dorlingus
